series_metadata.series_description: Records include correspondence pertaining to the creation/development of the agency’s Audit Committee (established by the order of the Director); including meeting minutes and supporting records documenting internal policy decisions regarding audit activities of the agency. (Most documents are originals; some are copies.)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 3 years. Review by State Archives for possible retention or destruction. ; Electronic: Retain in office 3 years. Review by State Archives for possible retention or destruction., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
